description: Get Values for Change Event Settings

budget_rom_source_for_in_scope.description: Budget ROM for all changes with this 'In Scope' will update based on these selections

budget_rom_source_for_out_of_scope.description: Budget ROM for all changes with this 'Out of Scope' will update based on these selections

budget_rom_source_for_tbd_scope.description: Budget ROM for all changes with this 'TBD' will update based on these selections

celi_prefill_automation.description: Allow Line Item auto-population of Budget Code, Vendor, and Contracts

change_order_value_source.description: This setting will determine which source is used to create or update Commitment COs/PCOs

copy_rfq_attachments_to_commitment_cos.description: Whether to copy the RFQ attachments to Commitment COs/PCOs

copy_rfq_attachments_to_prime_cos.description: Whether to copy the RFQ attachments to Prime COs/PCOs

display_revenue_detail_columns.description: Whether to display revenue ROM, latest price, latest cost, and over / under columns

display_spend_quantity_columns.description: Whether to display UOM, revenue qty, revenue unit cost, ROM unit qty, and ROM unit cost columns

prevent_both_prime_cos_and_budget_change.description: Whether to prevent Budget Changes and Prime Potential Change Order on the same Change Event Line Item

sync_wbs_code.description: Whether to maintain budget codes across all line items in sync
